description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure is predominantly white, with large rectangular volumes and a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The front features a driveway leading to a three-car garage, while the rear includes a spacious wooden deck and landscaped garden area. Windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light and visual interest. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes paved walkways and minimalistic landscaping. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, single-story white house with a flat roof, three-car garage, and a spacious rear deck. The design is geometric and minimalist, with asymmetrical windows and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, three-car garage, and main entrance with minimal landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and the transition from the garage to the rear deck.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the large wooden deck, garden area, and back facade with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the length of the house, boundary wall, and landscaped elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, minimal steps, and no porch or columns; integrated into the garage facade.
